The hospital is situated in Eldeco-I opposite A.W.H.O colony, near Bangla Bazaar which is approximately 7 kilometres from Chaudhary Charan Singh Airport and about 4 kilometres from Charbagh railway station. It is a multi-speciality facility built on 9000 square feet plot area and is a three-storied structure with the total floor area of 11,000 square feet. It is situated on 60 feet wide road and has a parking area for 15 to 20 vehicles.The reception area can accommodate 50 people at a time. The waiting area is fully air-conditioned. The hospital follows the guidelines of Lucknow Development Authority, is duly registered with Lucknow Nagar Nigam, Chief Medical Officer-Lucknow, State Pollution Control Board PNDT, MTP act, Fire dept etc. Read More Emergency Cases 05222447498 05222989996 We provide 24/7 professional emergency help. OPD TIMING Weekdays 09:30 AM – 6:00 PM Sun 09:30 AM – 2:00 PM Sat Emergency Only Registration Fee ₹ 700 Valid for 5 days from the date of registration.
